title: How to get a police certificate – Switzerland - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate – Switzerland
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Excerpt from the Swiss criminal records ( Privatauszug )

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.
Apply online or by mail to Schweizerisches Strafregister .

## Special considerations
IRCC does not require documents to be legalized (apostille).
The certificate covers both Switzerland and Liechtenstein.

## Police certificates for IEC applicants
Swiss citizens don’t need a police certificate for IEC applications. We may request one at a later time if needed.
For more information or for an online application form, see the Federal Office of Justice website (available in English, French, German and Italian).
